diagrams.title: Basis Vectors in R²
diagrams.description: Shows standard basis e₁=(1,0) and e₂=(0,1) in 2D plane with a vector expressed as combination
diagrams.purpose: Visualize how basis vectors create coordinate system and any vector is combination of them

diagrams.title: Linear Independence vs Dependence
diagrams.description: Compare independent vectors (different directions) vs dependent (same/scaled direction)
diagrams.purpose: Understand condition for vectors to form basis - must be independent

diagrams.title: Dimension Visualization
diagrams.purpose: Grasp dimension as degrees of freedom and how subspaces embed in larger spaces

diagrams.title: Rank-Nullity Theorem Diagram
diagrams.description: Shows relationship: domain dimension = rank + nullity with visual representation
diagrams.purpose: Visual understanding of Rank-Nullity theorem partitioning of domain

diagrams.title: Coordinate Vector Representation
diagrams.description: Shows vector with coordinates relative to different bases in same space
diagrams.purpose: Understand that coordinates depend on choice of basis, vector itself is invariant
